content: Lexi finds the exchange between the two amusing as Zyelle tries to wheedle her way into enticing Yutra. "**It's best to avoid unnecessary risks. We're playing a long game and right now, you're our best resource while we're here on this level.**"
**"So, let me get this straight. One of you wants me for my body, and the other for my mind... How did I get myself into this..."**
**"Hey, look at you miss popular."**
**"I suppose... It's not all bad, to feel desired..."**
**"Don't worry, after I have my way with you, I'll move on fast.... if that's any consolation."**
**"... Thanks... I think..."**

"**I'm sure I speak for us both when I say we're not going to ask you to do something you're unwilling to. You have the choice,**" she looks at Zyelle expecting her to agree. "**All I ask is; if you're not going to help, don't do anything to hinder us.**"
**"Yeah, we're not Sith... no offense. The point is, none of us are going to pressure you into anything. We're just going to... tickle you endlessly until you agree."**
**"Well, I suppose that's a slight improvement from previous..."**
**"What's your story anyway?"**
**"Nah ah, you first."**

Before they turn to her to talk, she asks a questiong of Zyelle. "**I was curious, Zyelle. All the Reapers I've meet are thus far are indoctrinated to follow the Sith ways. How is it you're so different?**"

**"Mmmmm... It's a touchy subject, actually. I can't reveal too much. A girl's gotta stay mysterious to be alluring ya know? Suffice it to say that my scientists were much more open minded than some others I've met."**
**"I don't know how much you know of Reaper creation... but I think I've already said too much."**

emoji.url: Galactic Campaigns - SW_ War of Prophecy - wop_ch6_securing-tantiss [1336794291011588116].json_Files/1f51e-cc3fbb9483f0b0bf.svg

content: Lexi nods, still curious, but understanding there were things that shouldn't be pushed. "**The Reaper project itself has brought out the worst in both the scientists and their creations.**" She pauses as she considers, "**I only know what Wraith has told me and from my own observations.**"
Yutra crosses her arms defensively. **"You expect me to share my secrets, while guarding yours Zye?"**

emoji.url: Galactic Campaigns - SW_ War of Prophecy - wop_ch6_securing-tantiss [1336794291011588116].json_Files/1f51e-cc3fbb9483f0b0bf.svg

content: "**I've also had the opportunity to meet the clone of the program's founder, Xod'mon'orkhez, and he revealed some secrets as well.**"
**"Oh? He say anything insightful?"**

"**Gloating mostly... he's the creator of the virus,**" she glances up at Veq. "**We thought we had stopped it then, but his apprentice managed to abscond with some of it and infected the Dark One.**"
**"Figures... I can't decide who's worse around here, the scientists or the mystics."**

emoji.url: Galactic Campaigns - SW_ War of Prophecy - wop_ch6_securing-tantiss [1336794291011588116].json_Files/1f51e-cc3fbb9483f0b0bf.svg

content: "**The Dark One needs something from the warehouse, a catalyst that will prevent those transformed from dying. In the meantime, he has no prohibitions from infecting as many as he can. He favors infecting the water sources.**"
She gives a small wave in reassurance before either of the others could grow concerned. "**This water is fine... I checked it.**"
Eyeroll. **"Thanks... That makes me feel *soooo* much better. Just in case, I'll keep my legs shut thank you very much."** She curls her legs closed.

emoji.url: Galactic Campaigns - SW_ War of Prophecy - wop_ch6_securing-tantiss [1336794291011588116].json_Files/1f51e-cc3fbb9483f0b0bf.svg

content: **"Don't worry, this waterfall is fed by a natural spring, it doesn't feed out of any of the artificial pipe systems around here. So..."** She leans in to Yutra, making her voice lower an octave: **"Spread 'em~"**

emoji.url: Galactic Campaigns - SW_ War of Prophecy - wop_ch6_securing-tantiss [1336794291011588116].json_Files/1f51e-cc3fbb9483f0b0bf.svg

content: Lexi rolls her eyes slightly, but felt less concerned about the water knowing it's source. Skinker and his pets too would be happy, once the trio vacated the area and the men could make their own use of the waterfalls. As Zyelle's mind goes back to trying to entice the ex-Inquisitor, Lexi's turns to other things. "**Yutra, can you tell me what the security consists of in the other blocks?**"

Huffs, then rolls her eyes. **"Yea. Sure."** Shifts her shoulders uncomfortably. **"Each of those Blocks is ran by a different Department of the Inquisition, called a Cabal. My Cabal was in charge of 'Enhanced Interrogation', basically a propaganda term for Torture. T'was full of lunatics, wackos, and nutjobs. Myself included. There's 3 other Cabals here on Wayland. Each has a cadre of murderers, sorcerers, and other insaniacs."**
**"Sounds delightful."**
Lexi nods her agreement to the sarcastic sentiment. "**What about the other Cabals? What are they in charge of?**"

**"Good Question."** Puffs at a piece of hair that landed across her sight. **"Are you sure you really want to know the answer to that? These 'people' are so wicked, that I use the term 'people' very loosely when referring to such individuals."** Puts hands on hips. **"I always knew the Inquisition was full of wackos, but I just thought that would mean I'd be able to meet some new, interesting people, ya know? Not your regular iron-boarded, stiff and stuffy navy boys. I wanted to meet somebody novel and interesting... Oh boy was I in for a lot more than I bargained."**
**"Wait... Weren't you the one that said your backstory was that you burned your whole village and reveled in their pleas for mercy?..?"**
**"Yeah, thanks for reminding me, Doll. I try to put a better spin on it when I'm around company."**
**"Oh. S-sorry. Please continue."** One hand covers her mouth.
"**Inconsistencies aside... Yes, I want to know. I don't know what we're going up against, other than the fact they're strong Force wielders.**"

**"I'll lay it out for you then, try to focus your mind off my breasts onto what I say, because it might just save your life."** Folds her arms across her chest again defensively. **"I was a part of the Cabal Sadisticus, called the Agonizers, in charge of Torturing all manner of poor souls, most frequently just used as a form of death sentence. The longer the victim survives, the better the quality of the Agonizer, and the higher the rank. Grand Inquisitor Yaga was the most evil bitch you've ever met, trust me."** Pouts. **"The Cabal in charge of Block A is called the Cabal Lectorum, or the Cabal of Lectors. They call themselves the Scripture Bearers, because they're in charge of the Sacred Texts as well as simultaneously in charge of administering The Reaper Propaganda Program. Practically, what that means is that they are in charge of services and education at the Cathedral, the learning institution at Mount Tantiss."**

emoji.url: Galactic Campaigns - SW_ War of Prophecy - wop_ch6_securing-tantiss [1336794291011588116].json_Files/1f51e-cc3fbb9483f0b0bf.svg

content: Lexi nods as Yutra talks. Wraith had at one point mentioned the mystics and the Sacred Texts. She presumed it was this Cabal as well that handled the rituals including the one that allowed time travel.

**"Administering Block D, The Cabal Praetorius is full of muscle-heads in charge of Protection and Security for the Royal Family."** Lifts one finger pointing to each of the blocks as she speaks, reaching far in the distance. **"The worst of the headcases are the Cabalite Intelligentsia, or the Intelligence Cabal, in charge of the Secret Police. They run block C, very efficiently I might add."** Pouts. **"Don't forget, each Cabal is led by a Grand Inquisitor, and each of the 4 Grand Inquisitors is hand-picked by the Immortal Emperor Palpatine himself. So... The question is..."** Puts hands on hips and glares at both ladies. **"Are you fucking crazy that you want to take them all on yourself, just to save this so-called Wraith, who apparently can satisfy all three of us at once!?"** She turns around and blushes, having made her pronouncement... The clean crisp mountain air echoes it far into the distance.
**"Oh-oh, that was impressive. Embarrassed yourself out of sexual frustration didn't you."**

emoji.url: Galactic Campaigns - SW_ War of Prophecy - wop_ch6_securing-tantiss [1336794291011588116].json_Files/1f51e-cc3fbb9483f0b0bf.svg

content: Lexi gives the ex-Inquisitor a small, patient smile. Her words come out softly, "**I came here knowing things wouldn't be easy. Force knows I don't even expect to survive.**" With a shake of her head she continues. "**In the end, this is the path I was set to walk. You may think me crazy and perhaps I am, but I've resigned myself to it.**"
**"Great, you sound like you'd feel comfortably at home with the Cabal Lectorum."**
**"Hey, that's not fair."**
**"Sorry... I didn't mean it like that..."**
**"You're too excited girl, come sit down and I'll give you a backrub."**
Exasperated sigh. **"Fine. I'll actually take you up on that... *if* you can confine yourself to nothing below the waist."**
**"That's a fair compromise, one I intend to revisit in future."** Winks.
Eyeroll. **"Why isn't Veq rearing to go all the time like you if he's a Reaper himself?"**
**"Was. Was a Reaper you mean. The virus changed him he says."**
Zyelle glances up at the top of the waterfall, where Veq had hiked up and sat in meditative posture, eyes closed, drinking in the natural beauty of Serenity.
**"Isn't reproduction kind of the... singular outstanding feature of viruses?"**
**"Not sexual reproduction."**
Wistful sigh. **"A shame..."**

emoji.url: Galactic Campaigns - SW_ War of Prophecy - wop_ch6_securing-tantiss [1336794291011588116].json_Files/1f51e-cc3fbb9483f0b0bf.svg

content: "**Veq was changed, but he's no longer infected. It's also my experience that Reapers focus either on their sexual desires, or find other means to satiate themselves.**" Lexi says, her gaze also going up to Veq for a moment. With a sigh she dips under the water, hoping it would wash away the tumult of thoughts and worries. Perhaps it was time to share her plans, the plans she and Wraith had made, and with it the burden.  "**You asked Yutra why we're here: the missions we were sent for, why the squad is here, is to secure the base and the cloning technology for use by my benefactor. There are multiple groups here working towards that goal, but individually. Wraith and I had infiltrated separately with our own squads with the intention of meeting up once inside.**" Talking once more in low tones that wouldn't carry farther than the water fall she continues, "**We were then either going to ditch our squads to complete their mission, or divert their resources for completing our ulterior objectives. First, we were going to sabotage our benefactor from getting the cloning technology. Neither he or I want to see any more Reapers or clones created to be used in a coming war. Second, I'm looking for a particular clone ready to be birthed. Third, Wraith is intent on killing the Reaper Queen.**"

Yutra takes a moment to catch up to all of this information. **"That's a lot to swallow. -- Ugh, Zye no, I get it thank you... Forgive me if I take a second to unpack what you just imparted, Jedi... What you're saying raises more questions than it does answers. Who is the mysterious benefactor organizing this massive operation? Who is this Clone you're seek to find, and why? Why does Wraith want Queen Medusa dead? Zyelle did you know about this? You look just as puzzled..."** The two are both looking at each other with quizzical expressions.
**"I had no idea. Don't really care. I'm just here for the view... Now, what was that about swallowing a large load?"**

emoji.url: Galactic Campaigns - SW_ War of Prophecy - wop_ch6_securing-tantiss [1336794291011588116].json_Files/1f51e-cc3fbb9483f0b0bf.svg

content: **"Wait you're serious, so you had no clue about any of this when you joined the Jedi and her band? How can you be so lackadaisical? Aren't you scared of what will happen to you when we're all caught and tortured to death... by my coworkers no less?"**

**"Hey! I'm a serious person too ya know. I challenged Lexi to a one on one duel, and she won. Fair and square. She's strong *and* easy on the eyes. You're just easy on the eyes, if you catch my meaning."**
**"Humph. I don't know whether to feel offended or flattered..."**

emoji.url: Galactic Campaigns - SW_ War of Prophecy - wop_ch6_securing-tantiss [1336794291011588116].json_Files/1f51e-cc3fbb9483f0b0bf.svg

content: Lexi had expected there to be more questions, she'd given the high level of her mission to them, but not the why or specifics. "**Our benefactor is Grand Admiral Thrawn. He's established what he calls the True Empire and is set on opposing Palpatine and his regime. To do that, he feels he needs an army of clones to counter the masses of Reapers and troops at Palpatine's disposal.**"
"**Wraith and I began working with him as our goals aligned in locating the source of the Empire's cloning facilities.**"
**"I see... I've heard of this, Grand Admiral Thrawn. As impractical as this story sounds... it makes sense."**
**"See? I told ya, Lexi knows what she's about. Now its your turn."**

**"You already know my tale, I was forced into the Inquisition at a young age and brought up into line with its dogmatic teachings. The rest you saw out there."** She gestures to the battlefield, where Veq had taken care to clean up the corpses so that no one would begin asking uncomfortable questions.
**And what, and?"**
**"And are you gonna help us find Wraith to have a foursome with?"**
Exasperated sigh. **"Fiiiiine, I'll help you get your rocks off."**
Zyelle claps both hands joyfully. **"Yay! We're officially a team now-- wooo!"**

emoji.url: Galactic Campaigns - SW_ War of Prophecy - wop_ch6_securing-tantiss [1336794291011588116].json_Files/1f51e-cc3fbb9483f0b0bf.svg

content: "**The men don't know, or at least acknowledged, that my goals run counter to their objective. It would be appreciated if we kept it between ourselves.**"
**That goes without saying. Don't worry, I can keep a secret... or extract one."**
**"There's that patented Inquisitorial Dark Humor you're always known for at parties..."**
**"What parties."**
**"I love it."**
**"Back off. I said you'd get your foursome after we rescue Papa Jedi, not before."**
"**When we get of Wayland, I know of an Imperial Knight who'd probably enjoy having his suite crashed to have a party,**" Lexi says with a conspiratorial wink.
**"If you think you're making it off this forsaken rock with your lives intact, based solely off of wishes hopes and dreams... I'm the Dark Inquisitor who is here to disabuse of you that illusion."**
**"Oh oh oh. Whip me first please."**
**"No-- that's not-- nevermind..."**
"**One has to have things to look forward to,**" Lexi grins.
Blinks innocently. **"Melted candlewax on my chest first?"**
**"We'll start with a rubber gag for your mouth."**
**"Teach me, Oh Sadistic One."**
**"I am sorely tempted..."**
With the conversation beginning to devolve once more, Lexi shakes her head and begins heading towards the shore.

The shore has been abandoned at her request, the sole occupant remaining was N-Zee, cleaning up their camp. **"Greetings Master. I have electrocuted 7 intruders genitals already, at your express orders Master."**
Flicking on his electro-staff briefly, he deactivates it for emphasis.

"**Thank you, NZ,**" Lexi comments idley as she gathers her clothing and begins to get dressed. Then winces as the droid flourishes his weapon. "**I hope you didn't hurt them too badly. Those bone heads don't seem to take a hint, do they?**" She wraps her white robe around herself to fight off the chill in the air. "**I'm going to need you and Ghost to do some recon. Will you be up for it?**"
**"Reconnaissance *is* one of my primary functions, Master."**

"**Primarily... I want you to find an unoccupied console and ascertain where exactly the Nighthawks and Wraith are being held. Yutra says the red keycard will give you access to the consoles on this level.**"
"**The others may be able to provide you descriptions.**"

**"Consider it done. Trooper Designation Ghost is with the other men over there, Master, and he doesn't follow orders from anyone, except from you directly. Perhaps you'd better bring the organic up to flank speed on this mission, Master."**
**"I've also noticed the males are highly susceptible to encouragement from well endowed females of the same species."**

Lexi nods and finishes getting dressed, cinching on her belt last before running her fingers through her drying hair. "**I would say that's true, especially when they've likely been confined to a ship where only a small percentage of the population is female. It doesn't help that Zyelle is by her nature promiscuous.**"
**"On a more positive note, Master, I'm detecting that morale has improved approximately 184% from prior."**

"**Even with the genital electrocutions?**" Lexi is bemused by the development. "**Hopefully we can keep the spirits high as we go into the jailbreak.**" Turning from NZ, she starts off in the direction of the squad, specifically for Ghost.
**"Yes, Master. I am happy to serve-- murder-- serve. Serve is what I meant."**
**"Commander? You wanted to speak with me."**
Ghost says quietly from behind Lexi.

"**I have a mission for you: I need you to work in concert with NZ to locate the Nighthawks and Wraith. You and NZ will locate a console where he can extract their locations before proceeding to scout out the blocks they're being held. If you can describe any of the Nighthawks to NZ, that would be helpful.**"

**"The console should be easy to access, there are several I've spotted on this level. However... The Blocks are heavily guarded by Inquisitors, as well as mundane troopers and security systems. Any excursion inside one of the Blocks would be highly hazardous to my health. The droid at least wouldn't be detectable by Inquisitors, but it does have a big mouth..."**
"**What about using the vents?**"
**"It's possible Commander, but like I said, any discovery by Inquisitors would mean zero chance at retreat."**
Lexi nods. "**Once you have the details as to where the others are being held, return here and we'll decide the next course.**"
**"As ordered."** He fades away.
"**One more thing, Ghost.**" She waits to see if he reappears once more. "**We need to locate gear for Bishop and the Nighthawks, whether it's their old kit or something new.**"
**"On it."** His voice returns from further away, then its gone.
**"Ahh! I'm sorry Commander! Please don't taze my family jewels, Commander, I didn't know you were coming over!"**
**"Forgive us Commander, please!"**
**"She's back, everybody."**

"**I doubt you lecherous dolts have learned your lesson,**" Lexi says severely. "**As long as you have then I won't report this to your superiors when we return to the Chimera,**" Lexi raises an eyebrow in question at the group.
Nobody says anything, looking tensely at one another. **"Of course, Commander, thank you, we understand."**
**"What are your orders."**

"**Right now... we wait. I've sent NZ and Ghost out to learn what they can about where the Nighthawks and Wraith are being held. When they return I'll either send them out to scout what they can or we begin planning how to extricate them.**" She looks at Skinker and then the others. "**The water is sourced from a spring and won't be affected by the Dark One. Refill your stores and enjoy the fresh water... After Zyelle and Yutra are done, of course.**"
**"Of course."** He executes a sharp turn to look at the others standing in line at attention. **"We'll make camp here until we have further orders, dismissed."**
The grumbling men begin to go about their camp business.
"**Magnet, do you have anything to report from comm chatter?**"
**"Yes Commander, it seems General Arctilius troops have made it to the Outer Perimeter and successfully breeched it, they should be here within a few hours, if all continues to go well."**
**"I'm also detecting a lot of chatter from official channels labelled only as Top Secret Inquisition, unable to open them without decryption codes."**
"**I'll check with Yutra to see if she has access to the decryption. In the mean time, are you able to record them for reference later?**"
"**I'm not sure if it would help, but I have an extra red keycard the Inquisitors use. It may have what you need.**"
**Although the Inquisitorial Red Keycard probably would help with access, the keycard itself doesn't hold the decryption program I need."**
**"So um..."** He shifts nervously, **"Unfortunately we have received no coded signals from Delta Team. They're completely dark."**
Lexi nods, but hands over the keycard anyways just in case. "**Bishop believes they were captured. What about from Alpha and Beta?**"
**"We have no codes established to contact them, and none that we would recognize as theirs. Operational Security, Thrax called it... They're on their own."**
"**Any chatter to indicate their current progress?**"
**"None that I can tell. There are firefights all over the place, and a massive battle near the Main Gate to Mount Tantiss."**
**"The diversion is definitely drawing their attention, Commander."**
"**Good, more they focus there, the less they'll see what we're doing.**" She nods content with the report. "**I'll ask Yutra about the decryption.**"
**"I'd venture a guess, she has access to Inquisition Comms via her personal datapad, that would obviate the need to slice their channel, something that would normally take a while."**
"**Thanks, which would mean she should have a history of the messages you've been seeing. Anything else you'd like to report?**"
**"Uh... Is Yutra... uh, spoken for, if you don't mind my asking?"**
Lexi considers for a moment whether she should answer and decides it may dissuade the men from making fools of themselves. "**For the moment... Zyelle has her sights on her.**"
Magnet gulps, and a slight trickle of af nosebleed starts under his helm. **"Oh-- *Oh*-- ...oh."**
**"In that case, I'll definitely be sure to keep a close eye on those two..."**
**"I mean-- In combat, to protect them."**

Lexi frowns at him and then shakes her head. "**You men are incorrigible...**" she says. "**Keep me apprised, please, if anything else comes up on the comms.**" With a curt nod to him in dismissal she waits for him to leave, looking over the men as they go about their tasks. Unless stopped, she turns to head back towards the waterfall.
The troopers swarm Magnet after Lexi leaves, afterwards there is a big uproar of laughter and excitement Lexi hears from the distance as she's walking away.

Arriving at the waterfall, Yutra is relaxing on a big warm, smooth boulder, breasts squeezed against the stone, while Zyelle administers a full body massage, interspersed by soft moans from the ex-Inquisitor.

Lexi decides now isn't the time to interrupt them and finds a place on the shore to sit and meditate, where the sounds from the waterfall might overwhelm those coming from the pair. Settling in, she finds the inner calm, something she desperately needs with recent events. Once more she reaches through the bond to find Wraith, this time sending out a telepathic inquiry: ***Where?***

Unfortunately, her attempts are for naught, the distraction from the pair overwhelming her center. She risks peering from below her eyelashes at the two, and standing relocates to find somewhere else. Perhaps Veq had found a good spot at the top of the waterfall.
**"Hey you three, down there. Get dressed. Something's happening."**  He points into the distance, where the Gate to Block C is opening slowly majestically.
Veq is no longer meditating, but staring intently across the massive cavern to the Detention Block gates.
Already dressed, Lexi vaults up the rocks to join Veq to see what is happening.
"**Yutra... do you have access to the Inquisition Comms... maybe what's happening is related to the increase in chatter my comms trooper was intercepting.**"
Veq has a hand over his eyes and looking intently at Gate C. **"The Gate is opening, I think something is coming."**

Startled by the alarm, Yutra does levitate up and enacts a simple Sorcery to summon a different set of clothes onto her hide, which definitely leave nothing to the imagination. Half undressed, she floats to the top of the waterfall next to Lexi and Veq, still groggy and half-mumbling. **"Wh--huh?~ Yawn~ What is it now..."**
"**Do you have access to prior messages on the Inquisition Comms?**" Lexi asks again. "**There's movement at Block C.**"

**"Yes, let me check... just a minute..."** Her expression turns grave. **"The Inquisitors are no fools. They've figured out that Bishop was absconded from the Infirmary, and that the Nighthawks are somehow related to this matter. By order of the Grand Inquisitor in charge, they've decided to Interrogate all of the Nighthawks and are transferring them from Block C to the Inquisitorial Block... That's where all the fun toys are."**
Lexi curses. "**They know we're watching and trying to force us to react.**"
"**Why else make a grand show out of it.**"
**"According to this, I don't think they know about your victory over Yaga and her students just yet."**

**"All they know is that a prisoner from the Infirmary escaped, and the Nighthawks are suspects. This might be your one chance to break them out while they're in transit, just like you did for Bishop."**
**"Plus... take a few more chess pieces off the board, so to speak."**
"**The difference being, we were able to get Bishop out of harms way. Perhaps it's time to accelerate the plans to start the riot in Block B.**"

**"Sorry to tell you, but... The lives of the Nighthawks were already forfeit when they were captured by Inquisitors. If they undergo enhanced interrogation, if they make it to that building with all of its torture rooms... they'll sing like canaries and your plan will be for naught."**
Lexi nods, accepting the truth of the ex-Inquisitors words. "**You suggest then a repeat of the stunt Zyelle and I pulled... Draw them into the arena?**"

**"I think that's our only play."** In the distance, Gate C has opened and a new procession of evil-looking armed and armored individuals are slowly marching out, followed by a chain-gang of heavily beaten troops, presumably the Nighthawks.
**"Round 2, hope you're ready for it."**
Lexi narrows her vision, trying to see if she recognizes any of them and counting. She looks for the one she is sure to recognize: Medic Zess. "**There's no time to waste then.**"
The light catches Zess face in exactly such a way, for a brief instant, as to allow Lexi to identify her definitively among the shambling prisoners.
